query: Find 10 parcels in Trondheim municipality that intersect quick-clay hazard areas, sorted by teigid ascending.

1.description: get kommunenummer and municipality geometry for Trondheim

2.description: get parcels (teig) in the Trondheim municipality by kommunenummer

4.description: reduce quick-clay polygons to those intersecting the Trondheim municipality

5.description: find parcels that intersect the reduced quick-clay polygons

6.description: collapse to one row per teigid (count intersections per teigid)

9.description: return only teigid for the final list of parcels
